subtitle.step1: Choose a date that works for you

infoMessage.title: Schedule our meeting based on your availability.
infoMessage.instruction: First choose your date, then indicate the time that suits you best.
infoMessage.confirmation: I will personally validate your slot as soon as I receive your request.

timeSelection.label: Indicate the appointment time:
timeSelection.confirmDateMessage: Now, please indicate a time that works for you
timeSelection.noDateMessage: Please pick a date from the calendar

contactMethod.label: How would you like to be contacted?
contactMethod.whatsappDescription: Free - Your request will be sent directly via WhatsApp
contactMethod.emailDescription: Free - I will get back to you by email

message.label: Tell me about your project (optional)
message.placeholder: Website, mobile app, custom tool... Tell me everything!

confirmationMessage.whatsapp: By clicking "Confirm", you will be redirected to WhatsApp. Free and non-binding.
confirmationMessage.email: By clicking "Confirm", I will get back to you by email. Free and non-binding.
